productDisplayName: Enamor Women Cameo Rose Coloured Briefs
description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsRose coloured briefs with lace detail in front, has a soft elasticated waistband, double layered front, cut out detail at the back, polyamide back and a low waistMaterial and Care92% nylon and 8% spandexHand washDrip dry
